meta.verdict: Authored rankings and claims are evidence, not a scored consensus model.

claims.rationale_summary: Nadeshot frames Scump's GOAT case around talent, map impact, difficulty to kill, and roster/context disadvantages rather than only trophies.
claims.quote: best and most talented player of all time
claims.quote_location: Dexerto article body quoting 100 Thieves Cast

verification_leads.title: TacticalRab GOAT/player debate videos
verification_leads.author: TacticalRab
caveats: Needs specific video URLs, timestamps, and transcript or hand-verified quote before scoring or display.

verification_leads.title: The Flank, Reverse Sweep, and player-podcast ranking claims
caveats: Needs stable episode URL, timestamp, speaker identity, and transcript or hand-verified quote.
Discussion segments should be labeled as discussion rather than formal ranking unless the source presents a ranked list.

verification_leads.title: RANKING THE TOP 5 COD PROS: INFINITE WARFARE
verification_leads.author: Enable
caveats: Needs manual timestamp extraction before becoming seeded evidence.
Do not use third-party repost snippets as a replacement for the original player-authored list.

verification_leads.title: Black Ops player-authored title ranking gap
caveats: Community threads and prize-money tables are not authored #16 evidence.
MLG-era formal or player-voted awards, if verified, should be routed to #11 instead of this lane.

verification_leads.title: Modern Warfare 3 player-authored title ranking gap
caveats: Third-party reposts without source identity are too weak for seeded authored evidence.
Keep community retrospectives in #15 unless they point back to a sourceable authored list.
